Id1.text: Airbus Group is the parent company of Airbus Defence & Space; where Ariane 5 was manufactured.

Id2.text: The Airbus Group is the parent company of Airbus Defence and Space who manufactured the Ariane 5.

Id3.text: The Airbus Defence and Space, whose parent company is Airbus Group, made the Ariane 5.
